title: The Boarwoods & the Tomb of the Talons

blocks.title: Night 1 — Embernips
blocks.content:
The party entered town on the tail of something wrong. Signs of the Embernips — red-orange-haired goblins carrying oil and torches — were everywhere. A man named **Wulfa** had lost his daughter during the chaos, though it emerged she had left willingly, following someone north. A missing sword came up: elvish design, possibly magical, passed down from the original druids of the area.

They followed the trail into the **Boarwoods**, where they found a wounded man at a campfire. His name was **Eric**. As the sun went down, he began to change.

Atnas put a round through his leg before it went further. More werewolves were already moving in from the southeast. Rue handled them with the campfire. Umara reversed Eric's shift with belladonna; Rue brewed a suppressant to keep him stable. Eric explained he had been forced into the change by wolf worshipers — and asked the group to find **Lilian Fullbrow** if they could. She had either escaped or she hadn't.

blocks.title: Night 2 — The Tomb
blocks.content:
Atnas ran ahead through the trees on overwatch while the party moved below. Spot and Atnas caught the flanking movement first — two goblins and a worg. Rue pulled the heat out of it and lit it up; Atnas dropped the goblins from cover.

The **Tomb of the Talons** sat behind a wall of thick fog, red-branched vines crawling and alive along its exterior. Two guards at the entrance. Rue and Spot rode up as a distraction. Astra went wide to flank. She tripped and fell into one of the guards. Atnas put both guards down before anyone inside heard a thing.

Inside: six more goblins in the foyer, surrounding a brazier of oil, singing sea shanties. Rue solved that problem efficiently. Spot put out the fire.

The inner chamber held a ritual in progress. Atnas went in first, dropped a hobgoblin to his knees with two shots. Umara shattered the circle, which cost nine fingers and sent backlash through the room. The kneeling hobgoblin sliced a medallion from his own chest and was pulled through it — gone from this universe. The priestess followed. The last one didn't get the chance.

blocks.title: Night 3 — The Oath
blocks.content:
Behind the sealed passage stood a statue and a plaque: *If you are to keep this, you must give it to me.* Astra found a manual override — necrotic consequence guaranteed. Atnas weighed it and took the **Oath of the Talon** instead. The passage opened.

**Sunaether** emerged and thanked the group. He offered Astra a staff and the party a collection of arms and armor. They returned them to Talon's Reach rather than keep them.

On the road back, howls. **Lilian Fullbrow** came out of the treeline at a run, two werewolves behind her. The party put them down. The dragonborn barbarian tracking the werewolves introduced himself: **Karak**.

Something followed them back to Hagatha's grove. Atnas recognized the pattern — these two weren't on his list of Brand members. The Brand was wider than he'd mapped. Wulfa got his daughter back, and asked Umara to return in a week.

blocks.title: Night 5 — The Black Dragon's Keep
blocks.content:
A chamber of many doors, overrun with undead. The party made quick work of them and found three ghosts bound to the will of the place's master. Astra and Rue unbound them together; the ghosts gave gifts in return.

Deeper in: two demons guarding forges manned by zombies, smelting gold and mithral. After the demons fell, the group left the zombies working — they were unaware, and there was nothing left to protect. A goblin necromancer in the final side chamber was guarding something unexpected: a young dragon, alive, and being tortured by the master.

The master was a **black dragon**. They defeated him.
